summary: Boardrooms & Auditoriums page redesign verified. All backend API tests pass (22/22). Frontend UI shows all required sections: Hero with COMMERCIAL badge, What We Deliver with 12-item capability grid, Why Choose LEXA sidebar (4 reasons), What You Get (3 feature cards), Products We Offer (8 image cards), Brands We Integrate (10 brands), Inspirations gallery (6 AI images), FAQ (4 questions), and CTA section. Navigation to product/brand pages works.

tests: 10 brands (Crestron, Extron, Barco, Biamp, Shure, QSC, Sony, Poly, Sennheiser, Harman AMX)
3 feature_cards (AV & Display, Audio & Communication, Smart Control & IoT)
Hero section: COMMERCIAL badge, title, description, CTA buttons (Get a Free Quote, View Projects)
What We Deliver section with expanded long_description and 12-item capability grid
Why Choose LEXA sidebar: Custom Design, Premium Brands, Full Integration, UAE Expertise
What You Get: 3 feature cards with icons and benefits lists
Products We Offer: 8 image-based clickable cards with correct hrefs to /solutions/{slug}
Brands We Integrate: 10 brand cards linking to /brands/{brand-slug}
Inspirations gallery: 6 AI-generated boardroom/auditorium images (first featured, spans 2 cols)
CTA: 'Let's Design Your Boardrooms & Auditoriums System' with Get a Free Quote button
Brand cards navigate to correct /brands/{slug} URLs
Lighting Automation page loads correctly (no regression)
Homepage loads: INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING, LEXA logo, navigation

critical_code_review_comments: SolutionClient.tsx properly implements all required sections with correct data-testid attributes
page.tsx correctly fetches productSolutions from related_products slugs
Backend model Solution.related_products changed from List[dict] to List to accept string slugs
All 8 product cards correctly link to /solutions/{slug}
All 10 brand cards correctly link to /brands/{brand-slug}
Gallery images labeled as 'Inspirations' with 'Design Ideas' sub-label
context_for_next_testing_agent: Boardrooms & Auditoriums page redesign complete and verified. Key sections: 1) Hero with COMMERCIAL badge, 2) What We Deliver with 12 smart system capabilities, 3) Why Choose LEXA sidebar (4 reasons), 4) What You Get (3 feature cards), 5) Products We Offer (8 image-based clickable cards), 6) Brands We Integrate (10 partner cards), 7) Inspirations gallery (6 AI images), 8) FAQ (4 Q&A), 9) CTA section. All navigation works. No regressions on lighting-automation or homepage.
